titleStmt.title: SII 27.23: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 23. (A.R. No. 69 of 1941-42.) RĀCHĀNAPALLE, ANANTAPUR TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up near a well on the road side.

This inscription refers itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalla ruling from Jayantīpura. It is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 45, Śārvari, Jyēshṭha-amāvāsye, Sunday, solar eclipse, The given details are irregular. Jyēshṭha-amāvāsya did not occur on a Sunday in the year Śārvari, nor was there a solar eclipse in that month. But if the month is a mistake for Āśvina, the details regularly correspond to 1120 A.D., October 24.

The record registers gifts of land, garden, an oil-mill for a lamp, four houses of which one was meant for the oil-mill and betel leaves, to god Mallikārjunadēva of Ṟedimalli, the capital of Kuḍiyape-40, by mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Kētamallarasa, and mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Mummaḍi Chōḷarasa. The gift was made over to Mallikārjuna-paṇḍita.

Of the donors, the first, Raviyarasa bearing the epithet Ayōdhyāpuravarādhīśvara is described as the son-in-law of Bhuvanaikamalla-mahārāja, while the second Kētamallarasa, bears the epithet Oṟeyūr puravarādhīśvara and eulogised by the characteristic Telugu-Chōḷa praśasti commencing with Aridurddhara-vara° etc.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
nama(ḥ) stuṁga śiraḥ ccuṁbi caṁdra cā
maracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbha mū
lastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti samastabhuvanā
śrayaṁ śrī prithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja para
mēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷu
kyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājya
muttarōttarābhivriddhi pravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkka tāraṁbaraṁ sa
luttamiralu jayantī purada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkatāvinō
dadiṁ rājyaṁ geyyuttamire . svasti samadhigata paṁcamahāsabda mahāma
ṇḍaḷēśvara Ayōdhyāpuravarādhīśvara vīramahēśvara celvānegaḷḷanāha
vasāhasa Aribaḷa malla jayaduttaraṁgaṁ baṁṭarabāvaṁ samasta
rājāsrayaṁ samastaprasasti sahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ
bhuvanaikamalla mahārājaraḷiyaṁ raviyarasaru .
svasti Aridurdhara ranēka bhujāsi bhāsura pracaṇḍa pradyōtita dinakarakula
naṁdanaṁ sukavisukaphaḷita naṁdanaṁ . kāsyapagōtra karikālānvayaṁ
satyaravitanayaṁ kāvērīnātha bandhujana pārijātaṁ kaṁbaḷa paṟighō ṣa
ṇaṁ prasannaguṇaratnabhūṣaṇaṁ śikhidhvajaṁ rūpa makaradhvajaṁ vividhavi
dyāviriṁcananuttaṁga siṁhalāṁcana noṟiyūrpuravarādhī
śvaraṁ kīrttirgadhīśvararśatrupura sūṟikāṟaṁ caḷadaṁkakāṟaṁ mūrvvalama
llaṁ maleparaṁkuśaṁ nāmādi samasta praśasti sahitaṁ śrīmanmahā
maṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ kētamallarasaruṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ muṁmaḍi
cōḷarasaruṁ . svastiśrī cāḷukya vikrama varṣada 45 neya sārvvari
saṁvatsarada jēṣṭadamātāsya Ādivāradaṁdu sūryyagrahaṇa nimittavāgi
kuḍiyave nālvattaṟarājadhāni ṟiḍimalliya śrī mallikārjuna dēvarirgge cā
rya mallikārjuna paṇḍitargge dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi
voladalubiṭṭa Ereyakeyi mattaru 15

haḷḷadabaḍa
gadaḍiyalu
huvina giḍu
viṁge biṭṭatōṁ
ṭa mattaru 1
nandādīvige
biṭṭagāṇa 1
gāṇadamane
yoḷagāge bi
ṭṭa mane 4 hē
ṟinalu biṭṭa
Ele 50 .
bahubhirvva
sudhā dattā rā
jabhiḥ sagarā
dibhiḥ yasya
yasya ya
dābhūmi ta
sya tasya ta
dā phalaṁ .
Ī dharmmavanā yuṁ pratipāḷisida
kurukṣētra prayāgeyalu
pāragarappa brāhmaṇa kavileya
ḍunkoḷagumaṁ kaṭṭisidāna
tta phaḷaṁ Idanaḷida tra vāraṇāsi yo
sāyirvva brāhmaṇarumaṁ kavileyaṁ koṁda dōṣa
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharā śaṣṭirvariṣa
sahasrāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .©Below this
Digital edition of SII 27.23 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
